pages.text: The new Butchering system allows for more meat and drops per animal, at the cost of a bit more work. To process an animal, kill it and shift-use an Axe on it's body to begin butchering it. Animal carcasses decompose (despawn) when left behind for too long, so make sure to harvest them ASAP.

pages.title: Processing
pages.text: Animals generally drop different cuts of meat per body part, and some animals, such as higher-quality ones or those that are Meat breed types, may drop even more meat per part.
